ogTitle: Ermington vs Erowal Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ermington and Erowal Bay.
heading: Ermington vs Erowal Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ermington, New South Wales and Erowal Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ermington has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Erowal Bay (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ermington or Erowal Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ermington has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Erowal Bay scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ermington scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Erowal Bay scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ermington or Erowal Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ermington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
